title: Oil Falls as Iran Deal Gets Tankers Moving Through Hormuz
title_cn: 伊朗协议使油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，油价下跌
summary: Oil futures and retail gasoline prices fell as the US and Iran agreed to an interim deal to end their months-long conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, spurring a flurry of ships to cross the critical chokepoint.

title: Record $21 Billion Water Bonds Sold With Trump Budget Cuts Ahead
title_cn: 特朗普削减预算，水债券发行量创纪录 210 亿美元
summary: Water utilities are selling bonds at a record pace to upgrade aging pipes and meet tougher regulations as they prepare for a potential pullback in federal funding.

title: A Return to $3 Gasoline? Here’s What It Will Take
title_cn: 汽油价格回归 3 美元？这就是需要做的事情
summary: Oil prices have plummeted following news of a US-Iran deal that is meant to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but US drivers probably will have to wait a while for cheaper gasoline. Traders and analysts say that prices are unlikely to fall to pre-crisis levels until stockpiles of crude oil and gasoline are replenished, which probably won’t happen before the end of 2026.

title: Stocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Spurs Oil Retreat: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊协议刺激石油回落，股市上涨：市场总结
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback that saw stocks climbing as oil fell after a peace deal between the US and Iran spurred optimism that a revival of the Strait of Hormuz will ease inflation risks.

title: Dollar Sees ‘Bullish Break’ as Fed Rate-Hike Bets Fuel Rally
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动美元反弹，美元迎来“看涨突破”
summary: The dollar staged its biggest two-day rally in nearly three months, driving it back toward the late-March peak, as traders piled into bets that the Federal Reserve will start raising interest rates as soon as late next month.

title: Big Tech Stock Buybacks Vanish as AI Spending Spree Eats Up Cash
title_cn: 随着人工智能支出热潮耗尽现金，大型科技股回购消失
summary: The artificial-intelligence race is becoming so expensive that it’s snuffing out one of the key forces that has helped keep Big Tech stocks soaring for years: steady share buybacks.

title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
title_cn: 查看巴西本周的热点话题
summary: Confira os assuntos que foram destaque da semana no Brasil com Patricia Xavier. Produção de Barbara Nascimento e Gisele Fernandes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Paramount-Warner’s ‘Too Low’ Deal Odds Leave Room for Arb Profit
title_cn: 派拉蒙华纳的“太低”交易赔率为套利利润留下了空间
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s proposed takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. just won crucial US approval — but with many hurdles remaining, traders still see opportunity to profit from how this $110 billion transaction will play out.

title: Intel Rallies After Trump Says It Struck Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示与苹果达成芯片协议后英特尔股价上涨
summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

title: New York Knicks Celebrate Championship With Millions of Fans Along Parade Route
title_cn: 纽约尼克斯队与数百万球迷沿着游行路线庆祝冠军
summary: For the first time in 53 years, the Knicks are having a parade in Manhattan's "Canyon of Heroes." Millions are on hand celebrating the teams NBA championship win. The parade features players including Jalen Brunson, Mikal Bridges, OG Anunoby and Karl-Anthony Towns, accompanied by New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, and will conclude at City Hall Plaza with a ticketed ceremony. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Rocks Bond Market in Debut, Sparks Surge in Hike Bets
title_cn: 沃什首次亮相债券市场，引发加息押注激增
summary:
Traders piled into betting on interest-rate hikes as soon as next month after Kevin Warsh used his debut press conference as Federal Reserve chairman to make clear the central bank won’t tolerate high inflation.
Jennifer Lee, Senior Economist at BMO Capital Markets, discusses the FOMC decision and what she expects to see as Kevin Warsh settles in as Fed Chair. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: First Brands Lender Can’t Distribute Cash From Bankruptcy Sales
title_cn: 第一品牌贷方无法分配破产销售中的现金
summary: Aequum Capital Financial II is temporarily barred from distributing any cash it collects from the inventory sales taking place as part of bankrupt auto-parts supplier First Brands’ liquidation, a judge ruled Wednesday.

title: Iran Deal Leaves Questions: Paggi
title_cn: 伊朗协议留下疑问：帕吉
summary: Livia Paggi, Senior Managing Director and Head of Political Risk at J.S. Held joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down President Trump’s Iran deal, warning that while markets welcomed lower oil prices and an open Strait of Hormuz, the agreement leaves major questions unresolved on Iran’s nuclear program, sanctions relief, ballistic missiles and Israel’s role in Lebanon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Knicks Championship Parade Takes Over NYC
title_cn: 尼克斯队冠军游行席卷纽约
summary: A ticker-tape parade celebrating the Knicks' NBA Championship kicked off Thursday morning in New York City in the "Canyon of Heroes." Millions of fans are on hand. Mayor Zohran Mamdani will present the team with keys to the city at City Hall. Bloomberg Senior Reporter Randall Williams joined Bloomberg Open Interest from the festivities in lower Manhattan with the latest on the celebration. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Polymarket Insider Trading Fears Grow
title_cn: Polymarket 内幕交易担忧加剧
summary: Polymarket is putting insider trading fears in plain sight. Bloomberg's Denitsa Tsekova joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how prediction markets have opened a new frontier for betting on geopolitics, from Iran strikes to peace deals, while transparent wallet activity makes suspicious trades easier to track than in traditional markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 6/18/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 6 月 18 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pimco Made $2 Billion Bet on Colombia Ahead of First Round Vote
title_cn: Pimco 在第一轮投票前对哥伦比亚押注 20 亿美元
summary: Funds managed by Pacific Investment Management Co. made a $2 billion bet on Colombia’s local government debt last month, ahead of the first round of a presidential election that is likely to reshape the nation’s economic model.

title: Gold Fluctuates as Traders Weigh US-Iran Truce and Hawkish Fed
title_cn: 交易员权衡美伊休战和鹰派美联储，黄金波动
summary: Gold swung between gains and losses as traders assessed an interim peace deal between the US and Iran, while a hawkish Federal Reserve shift has sparked bets on interest-rate hikes as early as October.

title: Stocks Join Bonds Higher as US-Iran Deal Sinks Oil
title_cn: 美伊协议导致石油价格下跌，股市跟随债券走高
summary:
Wall Street staged a comeback that saw stocks climbing as tech shares led gains and oil fell.
Anastasia Amoroso, Chief Investment Strategist: Private Wealth at Partners Group, discusses the day's market moves and what to expect from tech investment optimism. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kroger Falls on Downbeat Forecast; Intel Surges on Apple Deal | Stock Movers
title_cn: 克罗格因悲观预测而下跌；英特尔因苹果交易而飙升库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Intel (INTC) surged in premarket trading and Apple (AAPL) shares are also moving on news the chipmaker will work alongside Apple to design and produce semiconductors domestically. President Trump made the announcement.

- Smith and Wesson (SWBI) shares are rising this morning. The company had a profit of 36 cents a share on a comparable basis for the latest quarter, and sales of $178.4 million.

- Kroger (KR) shares slid the most intraday since Oct. 2022, after the CFO David Kennerley said that adjusted EPS for the second quarter is expected to be in line with a year ago. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Says Some Drug Users Can Possess Guns
title_cn: 最高法院称一些吸毒者可以拥有枪支
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that the government can’t categorically bar marijuana users from possessing firearms in a decision that expands the Constitution’s Second Amendment. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Second Iran-Bound Corn Ship Crossed Hormuz Before Peace Deal
title_cn: 第二艘开往伊朗的玉米船在和平协议前穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: A second ship laden with corn bound for Iran transited the Strait of Hormuz just hours before the US-Iran interim deal to end the war and reopen the waterway was announced.

title: Stranded Oil Is Streaming Out of Hormuz as Deal Takes Effect
title_cn: 随着协议生效，搁浅的石油正从霍尔木兹流出
summary: A growing stream of stranded oil is making its way out of the Strait of Hormuz and Kuwait said it will start ramping up production, as the US-Iran interim peace deal sparks a flurry of activity that is already pushing Middle East flows toward pre-war levels.

title: Fed Proposes Payment Stablecoin Issuer Identification Program
title_cn: 美联储提议支付稳定币发行人识别计划
summary: The Federal Reserve proposed requiring payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program designed to curb illicit activities, the latest step from US regulators embracing digital assets.

title: Argentina MSCI Review Holds Key to Foreign Investment Surge
title_cn: 阿根廷 MSCI 审查是外国投资激增的关键
summary: MSCI Inc. will decide next week whether to set Argentina on the road back to membership in global stock indexes, a move that could trigger a rush of funds into the illiquid local market.

title: US Gas at the Pump Falls Below $4 as Iran Pressure Eases
title_cn: 随着伊朗压力缓解，美国天然气价格跌至 4 美元以下
summary: US gasoline prices dipped below $4 a gallon for the first time since March, providing welcome relief to consumers after a historic global supply disruption sent fuel costs soaring for months.

title: The Crypto-Treasury Dream Unravels After a 90% Stock Plunge
title_cn: 股价暴跌 90% 后加密货币金库梦想破灭
summary: The business model of launching a public company to buy crypto is falling apart. As a result, those in the queue to do so through blank-check companies are facing pressure from investors against a market backdrop that is fiercely unfriendly.

title: Alibaba's Tsai, zu Furstenberg Discuss AI Investment
title_cn: 阿里巴巴董事局主席蔡崇信将与芙丝汀宝讨论人工智能投资
summary: Alibaba Group Chairman Joe Tsai and General Catalyst Managing Director Jeannette zu Furstenberg discuss investment opportunities and leadership with the development of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WWW Inventor Tim Berners-Lee on Development of AI
title_cn: WWW 发明家 Tim Berners-Lee 谈人工智能的发展
summary: Tim Berners-Lee, the inventor of the World Wide Web, discusses the development of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Extends Two-Day Drop a Week After Largest-Ever IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 在史上最大规模 IPO 后一周延长两天跌幅
summary: SpaceX is proving that even the largest-ever IPO is not immune to the type of share-price volatility that tends to rock big companies after they go public.

title: US Acts to Accelerate Power Grid Hook-Ups for AI Data Centers
title_cn: 美国加速人工智能数据中心并网的法案
summary: US regulators have taken their biggest step yet to speed the connection of data centers to the country’s grids while simultaneously attempting to slow surging utility bills that have angered Americans.

title: Anduril Secures Landmark Air Force Drone Contract
title_cn: 安杜里尔 (Anduril) 获得具有里程碑意义的空军无人机合同
summary: Anduril just won a production contract for autonomous fighters with the US Air Force. It's also secured a key role in the race to provide software for those aircraft, and is moving toward scaled manufacturing as the Pentagon pushes for a fleet of up to 1,000 autonomous combat jets. Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss it all. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Rallies After Trump Says It Struck Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示与苹果达成芯片协议后英特尔股价上涨
summary:
Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.
Anurag Rana, Senior Tech Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses the deal and what it means for both companies and the broader tech landscape. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Workers Say Data Center Testimony Prompted Interrogation
title_cn: 亚马逊员工称数据中心证词引发审问
summary: Three Amazon.com Inc. workers say the company violated a Seattle ordinance by interrogating them after they testified in favor of regulation of data centers in the city.

title: Stocks Rise With Nvidia Leading as Semiconductor Companies Surge
title_cn: 半导体公司激增，英伟达领涨，股价上涨
summary: US stocks rose on Thursday as chips shares extended Wednesday’s rally. Nvidia Corp. topped S&P 500 Index gainers on a points basis, while the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index, known as the SOX, advanced more than 6% to a record high.

title: Healthcare's Next AI Revolution
title_cn: 医疗保健的下一次人工智能革命
summary: Infinitus CEO Ankit Jain joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the next generation of AI won't be copilots or chatbots—but autonomous agents that handle healthcare tasks end-to-end. He discusses insurance approvals, rising AI costs, healthcare inefficiencies, and why the industry must focus on outcomes instead of computation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Intel Inked Chip Deal With Apple
title_cn: 特朗普表示英特尔与苹果签署了芯片协议
summary: US President Donald Trump said Intel will work alongside Apple to design and produce semiconductors domestically. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon in Talks to Sell Custom AI Chips in Bid to Cut Nvidia’s Dominance
title_cn: 亚马逊正在洽谈销售定制人工智能芯片，以削弱英伟达的主导地位
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is in talks to sell its custom-made artificial intelligence chips for use in other companies’ data centers, a key expansion of its efforts to cut into Nvidia Corp.’s dominance.

title: Jeremy Grantham on How to Tell if a Bubble’s About to Burst
title_cn: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆谈如何判断泡沫是否即将破裂
summary:
Jeremy Grantham has a long history of calling bubbles.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, GMO's co-founder and chief investment strategist tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway what he thinks about Mag 7's multibillion-dollar investment into AI and the signs he watches out for to spot when a bubble might burst. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Shutterfly Debt Concessions Expose AI, Competition Risk
title_cn: Apollo 的 Shutterfly 债务减让暴露了人工智能和竞争风险
summary: Shutterfly’s track record in credit markets has been far from picture-perfect, but its latest refinancing laid bare a newer challenge: the cost of managing burdensome debt amid intensifying competition in an artificial intelligence economy.

title: Why AI’s All-You-Can-Eat Buffet Is Coming to an End
title_cn: 为什么人工智能的自助餐即将结束
summary: Silicon Valley spent much of the past few years feverishly pushing consumers and businesses to inject artificial intelligence into every corner of their lives. Now AI developers want their customers to pay more for the technology they actually use.

title: Waymo Recalls Robotaxis Over Driving Through Freeway Work Zones
title_cn: Waymo 召回超过高速公路工作区的机器人出租车
summary: Waymo is recalling thousands of its robotaxis to fix a software issue that could cause the autonomous vehicles to enter and drive at speed through freeway construction zones.

title: Accenture Forecast Sends Stock Tumbling a Record 20%
title_cn: 埃森哲预测股价暴跌创纪录 20%
summary: Accenture Plc said it’s expecting to reel in less revenue in the coming months, as artificial intelligence upends the consulting services industry and clients paused business due to the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Anthropic Lays Out Vision for How to Bolster AI Models’ Safety
title_cn: Anthropic 提出了如何增强人工智能模型安全性的愿景
summary: Anthropic PBC co-founder Jack Clark said the company is in daily discussions with the Trump administration to resolve security concerns surrounding the startup’s top two artificial intelligence models and outlined his vision for ensuring the safety of the emerging technology.

title: AI Power Boom Catapults NextEra to Top of Hybrid Debt Market
title_cn: 人工智能的蓬勃发展使 NextEra 跃居混合债务市场之首
summary: As utilities splash out on spending to power America’s AI boom, NextEra Energy Inc. has just emerged as the largest issuer of hybrid bonds worldwide.

title: ‘Grand Theft Auto VI’ Pre-Orders to Open June 25; Take-Two Jumps
title_cn: 《侠盗猎车手 VI》将于 6 月 25 日开放预购；两次跳跃
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. will open pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI on June 25, kicking off the launch of one of the most anticipated video games of all time.

title: Tariffs Greater Impact Than War: Trumpf
title_cn: 特朗普：关税的影响比战争更大
summary: The Iran war has not had a "severe" impact on the machine tool industry says Stephan Mayer, CEO for Machine Tools at German manufacturing technology firm Trumpf. Instead, the bigger headwind to the industry has been tariffs, according to Mayer. He spoke to "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Ban Forces Investor Rethink of Political Risk
title_cn: 人为禁令迫使投资者重新思考政治风险
summary: Investors in the ever-hotter AI stock rally must suddenly consider a risk with the potential to be even more damaging than high valuations and big spending: Politics getting in the way.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Cloud Services Face Tough EU Antitrust Law
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊云服务面临严厉的欧盟反垄断法
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s Azure and Amazon Web Services are on a collision course with the European Union’s tough digital competition rulebook, after an initial probe into their power over the cloud.

title: Software Buyout King Orlando Bravo Attempts an AI-Era Reboot
title_cn: 软件收购之王 Orlando Bravo 尝试重启人工智能时代
summary: The billionaire behind Thoma Bravo is seeking to reassure investors that the private equity firm is ready to embrace AI — and that its losing bet on Medallia is a one-off.

title: US Premarket Movers for June 18, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 6 月 18 日美国盘前走势
summary: US stocks are eyeing a rebound after President Donald Trump signed an interim peace deal with Iran. S&P 500 Index futures are up 0.5% at 7:45 a.m. in New York.

title: Lawyer Takes Fight to Keep Kids Off Social Media From Courthouse to Political Arena
title_cn: 从法院到政治舞台，律师努力阻止孩子们远离社交媒体
summary: Matthew Bergman pitched UK officials to protect kids from social media harms

title: Europe Scales Down AI Ambitions With Smaller Data Center Tender
title_cn: 欧洲通过缩小数据中心招标规模来缩小人工智能野心
summary: The European Union downsized plans for data centers to support artificial intelligence, outlining a call for tenders that includes smaller-scale facilities than originally envisioned.

title: Swiss AI Startup Prem Is Raising $100 Million Series A Round
title_cn: 瑞士人工智能初创公司 Prem 筹集 1 亿美元 A 轮融资
summary: Prem AI, a Swiss startup that helps companies including hedge funds and law firms run artificial intelligence models on their own private infrastructure, is raising $100 million in a Series A funding round.

title: US Ends Hormuz Blockade, Downplays Tolls as Negotiations Restart
title_cn: 美国结束霍尔木兹封锁，淡化死亡人数，重启谈判
summary: The US-Iran interim peace deal took effect and shipping started returning to the Strait of Hormuz as the US declared an end to its blockade and a complex negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program began in earnest.

title: US Student Loan Defaults Rise to 9.2 Million Amid Crackdown
title_cn: 美国学生贷款违约率在打击行动中上升至 920 万
summary: The number of student loan borrowers in default soared to a record 9.16 million in April after the government ended a four-year pause on collections that was instituted during the Covid pandemic, according to the latest data from the US Department of Education.

title: Cuba Makes Market-Friendly Changes in Face of Trump Pressure
title_cn: 古巴面对特朗普压力做出有利于市场的改变
summary: Cuba’s leadership signed off on a sweeping list of 176 market-liberalization measures covering 23 core areas, as the Caribbean nation tries to rescue a moribund economy that’s being squeezed by US sanctions.

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Kicks In as Focus Shifts to Hormuz Flows
title_cn: 随着焦点转向霍尔木兹流，特朗普的伊朗协议开始生效
summary:
US President Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran is starting to take effect, with focus shifting to the resumption of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and a complex 60-day negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program.
Wayne Sanders, Senior Defense Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses the memorandum and what he expects to see over the next two months as talks resume for a nuclear deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lithuania’s Nauseda Says It’s Not the Time to Talk With Putin
title_cn: 立陶宛总统纳乌塞达表示现在不是与普京交谈的时候
summary: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda said the European Union shouldn’t rush into peace talks with Russia, distancing himself from recent EU efforts to engage Vladimir Putin.

title: Israel Foreign Minister Severs Ties With EU’s Top Diplomat
title_cn: 以色列外长与欧盟高级外交官断绝关系
summary: Israel’s foreign minister said he was cutting off all contact with the European Union’s top diplomat, Kaja Kallas, citing her “blatant unfairness” and underscoring the Jewish state’s growing isolation from many of its closest allies.

title: Australia Must be ‘Monocultural,’ Pauline Hanson Says
title_cn: 宝琳汉森说，澳大利亚必须是“单一文化”
summary: Australia’s hard-right leader Pauline Hanson has called for a “monocultural society,” rejecting decades of the country’s multiculturalism and blaming its housing crisis on high levels of immigration.

title: Vance Says Iran Deal Is a 'Win-Win' for the US
title_cn: 万斯表示伊朗协议对美国来说是“双赢”
summary: US Vice President JD Vance speaks at a news conference about President Donald Trump's signed memorandum of understanding with Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Televised Supreme Court Sessions Backed by Key Senate Panel
title_cn: 由参议院主要小组支持的最高法院电视会议
summary: The Senate Judiciary Committee approved legislation Thursday to televise Supreme Court proceedings, a step long resisted by the high court’s justices but sought by open government advocates.

title: Lithuania Expects Improvement in China Ties Within Six Months
title_cn: 立陶宛期待与中国的关系在六个月内得到改善
summary: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda said he expects to see the first results of the country’s diplomatic outreach to China within the next six months, as the Baltic nation moves to mend ties with Beijing following a spat over Taiwan.

title: UK Government Eases Pressure on Tougher Green Building Upgrades
title_cn: 英国政府减轻了对绿色建筑升级的压力
summary: The UK has delayed rules that will require commercial landlords to meet stricter energy efficiency regulations for some of their buildings, giving building owners five years to meet the new standards while exempting smaller properties.

title: Why Releasing Iran’s Assets Is a Political Headache for Trump
title_cn: 为什么释放伊朗资产是特朗普的政治难题
summary: The US for decades has pursued a campaign of pressuring Iran economically, including by deploying measures that have frozen billions of dollars of Iranian assets situated all over the world. Now, as part of a deal to end its three-month war with the country — which has threatened economies around the globe by curtailing access to oil, gas and fertilizer — the US is offering to facilitate the release of blocked Iranian funds.

title: Modi’s Restraint in Trump Meeting Signals India’s Caution
title_cn: 莫迪在特朗普会面中的克制表明印度的谨慎
summary: US President Donald Trump showered Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi with praise in their first in-person meeting in more than a year.

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Kicks In as Focus Shifts to Hormuz Flows
title_cn: 随着焦点转向霍尔木兹流，特朗普的伊朗协议开始生效
summary: US President Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran is starting to take effect, with focus shifting to the resumption of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and a complex 60-day negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program.

title: Massachusetts Court Strikes Down Tax Cut Ballot Measure
title_cn: 马萨诸塞州法院否决减税投票措施
summary: The Massachusetts Supreme Judicial Court struck down a ballot proposal for a state income-tax cut that was backed by certain business groups.

title: Lula Ally Allegedly Got Apartment, Tickets in Banco Master Fraud
title_cn: 卢拉·艾莉涉嫌在银行大师诈骗中获得公寓和门票
summary: Brazilian investigators suspect Banco Master and related entities paid for an apartment and premium concert tickets for relatives of Senator Jaques Wagner as part of a scheme to conceal kickbacks to the senior ally of President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, according to Supreme Court documents.

title: Biggest Baltic Rail Project Needs EU’s Help, Latvia Premier Says
title_cn: 拉脱维亚总理表示最大的波罗的海铁路项目需要欧盟的帮助
summary: Latvia’s prime minister said he intends to approach the European Union’s executive arm with a new plan for the Rail Baltica train link, as the Baltic region’s biggest infrastructure project is unlikely to be completed on time.

title: Zimbabwe Lawmakers Back Two-Year Extension to President’s Tenure
title_cn: 津巴布韦立法者支持将总统任期延长两年
summary: Zimbabwean lawmakers approved a controversial amendment to the constitution that will lay the ground for President Emmerson Mnangagwa to extend his rule by two years.

title: US Announces Military Review as European Leaders Await Cuts
title_cn: 美国宣布军事审查，欧洲领导人等待削减
summary: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said the US will kick off a six-month review of its military presence in Europe as leaders in the region brace for a plan for deep cuts to American support for the continent.

title: Abu Dhabi’s $1 Trillion Man Emerges as Iran Troubleshooter
title_cn: 阿布扎比身价1万亿美元的人成为伊朗问题解决者
summary: Sheikh Tahnoon bin Zayed Al Nahyan is best known as the defacto business chief of Abu Dhabi’s wealthy ruling family and the man at the helm of a $1.5 trillion empire. Behind the scenes, he has taken on another role: Diplomatic emissary charged with helping rebuild the United Arab Emirates’ relationship with Iran.

title: Venezuela Hires Law Firm to Help Negotiate Oil Production Deals
title_cn: 委内瑞拉聘请律师事务所帮助谈判石油生产协议
summary: Venezuela’s short-staffed national oil company has hired international law firm Greenberg Traurig to help expedite contract negotiations with a flurry of companies ahead of a key regulatory deadline in August.

title: China Rejects Japan Defense Chief Criticism of Military Spending
title_cn: 中国拒绝日本防卫长官对军费开支的批评
summary: China rejected criticism from Japanese Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi about the accuracy of its military spending, accusing Japan of using such arguments to justify the expansion of its own armed forces.

title: Russian Gasoline Prices Jump as Ukraine Strikes Refineries
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击炼油厂导致俄罗斯汽油价格上涨
summary: Russian gasoline prices advanced further, with Ukrainian attacks on refineries forcing some filling stations to limit sales just as the summer vacation season gets underway.

title: JPMorgan’s Vince La Padula to Join IRS After 23 Years at Bank
title_cn: 摩根大通 (JPMorgan) 的文斯·拉帕杜拉 (Vince La Padula) 在银行工作 23 年后加入国税局 (IRS)
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Vince La Padula, who led the firm’s workplace solutions business, will leave the bank after more than two decades to take a senior role at the Internal Revenue Service.

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Sets Up Legacy-Defining Moment
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗协议树立了历史性的决定性时刻
summary: Some Republicans are already lacing into the agreement

title: UK Cabinet Pushes Starmer to Raise Defense Spending Amid Row
title_cn: 英国内阁敦促斯塔默在争议中增加国防开支
summary: Some UK cabinet ministers are pushing Prime Minister Keir Starmer and his chancellor of the Exchequer, Rachel Reeves, to increase defense funding further, following John Healey’s resignation over the spending row.

title: Turkey to Reopen Orthodox Seminary in Face of Trump, EU Pressure
title_cn: 面对特朗普和欧盟的压力，土耳其将重新开放东正教神学院
summary: Turkey plans to reopen the long-shuttered Halki seminary as a university, reviving an institution central to Orthodox Christianity and addressing a longstanding demand from the US and the European Union.

title: First Saudi Supertankers Begin Hormuz Crossing
title_cn: 第一批沙特超级油轮开始穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Some oil and gas vessels have begun to cross the Strait of Hormuz, including ships owned by Saudi Arabia’s state tanker giant. The movement of Saudi ships through the waterway marks the first large volumes of Saudi oil to cross the strait since the Iran war began. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Needs a Nuclear Mousetrap
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗协议需要一个核捕鼠器
summary: Interim pact opens the door for 60 days of talks that will show who wins the debate on Iran.
